improvements.title: Inject real market data into the prompt
improvements.evidence: Avg specificity: 8.8/10. 5 hallucinated facts. Blueprints lack real competitor names, real market sizes, real regulatory bodies.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "Cite real competitors (names, URLs), real TAM/SAM/SOM numbers with sources, real regulatory bodies. Do NOT fabricate URLs or statistics. If you don't know a number, say 'TBD' rather than guessing."

improvements.title: Ban generic startup jargon with explicit blacklist
improvements.evidence: 2 generic phrases found across all blueprints: leverage, disrupt, seamless, end-to-end, world-class, cutting-edge, next-gen, game-changing.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "BANNED PHRASES (using any = automatic failure): leverage, disrupt, synergy, ecosystem, scalable, innovative, game-changing, seamless, end-to-end, world-class, cutting-edge, next-gen, revolutionary, best-in-class. Replace with specific, concrete language."

improvements.title: Require concrete, measurable roadmap milestones
improvements.evidence: Avg actionability: 7.8/10. Roadmap items use vague verbs like 'build' and 'develop' without measurable outcomes.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "Each roadmap item MUST include a measurable deliverable. Example: 'Ship landing page with 3 waitlist signups from 10 cold emails' — NOT 'Build website'. Every item needs: what ships, how you measure success, and who owns it."

improvements.title: Force brutal honesty in roast and verdict sections
improvements.evidence: 0 weak/vague recommendations detected. Roast scores cluster around 5-7 (diplomatic). Verdicts avoid saying 'this will fail'.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "The roast must be BRUTALLY honest. If the idea is mediocre, say 'This idea is mediocre and here's why.' Avoid 'consider X' — say 'You will fail unless you do X'. The verdict badge must reflect real risk, not diplomatic averages. A 'pass' badge should be rare (top 20% of ideas)."

improvements.title: Differentiate revenue projections by stage with hard constraints
improvements.evidence: Revenue projections often use similar scales ($10K-50K/mo) regardless of ideation vs seed stage. Growth rates are unrealistically smooth.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "Revenue projections MUST match stage: Ideation: $0-5K/mo for 12 months. Pre-seed: $1-20K/mo. Seed: $10-100K/mo. Growth: $50K-1M/mo. Use realistic month-over-month growth (5-20% for early stage, not linear). Include a 'realistic' and 'optimistic' column."
